subcodes.first_line: Most of the beloved have been seized with agitation by the trials of these grievous days, though We had forewarned them thereof aforetime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخذ الاضطراب اکثر الاحباب من فتنه ایام الشداد بعد الذی اخبرناهم بها من قبل
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @Satan; the Evil One, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @predictions and prophecies, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
